series_metadata.series_description: Death penalty cases brought in state and federal courts. Records include, but are not limited to, transcripts, exhibits, pleadings, decisions associated with legal action for current and prior proceedings, discovery material, defense records, dispositions, correspondence, research on previous motions, orders and rulings, attorney notes and materials compiled for Ohio Attorney General response to executive clemency, and federal Habeas Corpus petitions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: inmate's death or resentencing and no longer of administrative value. Review possible State Archives before destruction. ; Paper: inmate's death or resentencing and no longer of administrative value, unless scanned and saved electronically. Review possible State Archives before destruction
